'''âg-w-j''' ('''kagawaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coassume|coassume]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-w-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coassume|coassume]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-w-j
|-
! Lemma
| kagawaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigawaj|thigawaj]] || [[word:jigawaj|jigawaj]] || [[word:shigawaj|shigawaj]] || [[word:kigawaj|kigawaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugawaj|thuthugawaj]] || [[word:jujugawaj|jujugawaj]] || [[word:shushugawaj|shushugawaj]] || [[word:kukugawaj|kukugawaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugawaj|thugawaj]] || [[word:jugawaj|jugawaj]] || [[word:shugawaj|shugawaj]] || [[word:kugawaj|kugawaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugawaj|thugawaj]] || [[word:jugawaj|jugawaj]] || [[word:shugawaj|shugawaj]] || [[word:kugawaj|kugawaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegawaj|thegawaj]] || [[word:jegawaj|jegawaj]] || [[word:shegawaj|shegawaj]] || [[word:kegawaj|kegawaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogawaj|thothogawaj]] || [[word:jojogawaj|jojogawaj]] || [[word:shoshogawaj|shoshogawaj]] || [[word:kokogawaj|kokogawaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogawaj|thogawaj]] || [[word:jogawaj|jogawaj]] || [[word:shogawaj|shogawaj]] || [[word:kogawaj|kogawaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogawaj|thogawaj]] || [[word:jogawaj|jogawaj]] || [[word:shogawaj|shogawaj]] || [[word:kogawaj|kogawaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgawaj|thĂŠgawaj]] || [[word:jĂŠgawaj|jĂŠgawaj]] || [[word:shĂŠgawaj|shĂŠgawaj]] || [[word:kĂŠgawaj|kĂŠgawaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagawaj|thathagawaj]] || [[word:jajagawaj|jajagawaj]] || [[word:shashagawaj|shashagawaj]] || [[word:kakagawaj|kakagawaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagawaj|thagawaj]] || [[word:jagawaj|jagawaj]] || [[word:shagawaj|shagawaj]] || [[word:kagawaj|kagawaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagawaj|thagawaj]] || [[word:jagawaj|jagawaj]] || [[word:shagawaj|shagawaj]] || [[word:kagawaj|kagawaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagawaj|shagawaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagawaj|goshagawaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagawaj|gokishagawaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagawajnĂŒ|shagawajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagawajnknĂŒ|goshagawajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagawajnĂŒ|gokishagawajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagawajshĂ«|shagawajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagawajnkshĂ«|goshagawajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagawajshĂ«|gokishagawajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagawajro|shagawajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagawajnkro|goshagawajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagawajro|gokishagawajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagawajmu|shagawajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagawajnkmu|goshagawajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagawajmu|gokishagawajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagawajsher|shagawajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagawajnksher|goshagawajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagawajsher|gokishagawajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagawajng|shagawajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagawajnkng|goshagawajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagawajng|gokishagawajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagawajya|shagawajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagawajnkya|goshagawajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagawajya|gokishagawajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagawajyam|shagawajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagawajnkyam|goshagawajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagawajyam|gokishagawajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagawajnĂŒshĂ«|shagawajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagawajnknĂŒshĂ«|goshagawajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagawajnĂŒshĂ«|gokishagawajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagawajnĂŒro|shagawajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagawajnknĂŒro|goshagawajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagawajnĂŒro|gokishagawajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagawajnĂŒmu|shagawajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagawajnknĂŒmu|goshagawajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagawajnĂŒmu|gokishagawajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagawajshĂ«nĂŒ|shagawajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagawajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshagawajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagawajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishagawajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagawajshĂ«ro|shagawajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagawajnkshĂ«ro|goshagawajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagawajshĂ«ro|gokishagawajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagawajshĂ«mu|shagawajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagawajnkshĂ«mu|goshagawajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagawajshĂ«mu|gokishagawajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagawajronĂŒ|shagawajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagawajnkronĂŒ|goshagawajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagawajronĂŒ|gokishagawajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagawajroshĂ«|shagawajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagawajnkroshĂ«|goshagawajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagawajroshĂ«|gokishagawajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagawajromu|shagawajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagawajnkromu|goshagawajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagawajromu|gokishagawajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagawajmunĂŒ|shagawajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagawajnkmunĂŒ|goshagawajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagawajmunĂŒ|gokishagawajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagawajmushĂ«|shagawajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagawajnkmushĂ«|goshagawajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagawajmushĂ«|gokishagawajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagawajmuro|shagawajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagawajnkmuro|goshagawajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagawajmuro|gokishagawajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
